messenger.telegram.start:
Welcome to Presence Tracker!

To receive attendance challenges, register your display name:

/register <your display name>

Example: /register John Smith

Each account may hold one registration at a time. Sending /register again replaces it. Use /whoami to see your current registration and /unregister to release it.
messenger.telegram.whoami.current_hint: Use /register <name> to change it, or /unregister to release it.
